title: Airdrops
description:
Airdrop is a Minecraft plugin that spawns supply drops from the sky with valuable loot .

Enjoy :)
body:
## **Airdrop Plugin**

**Made by Spideyy_OG**

---

### **Core Idea:**

Random airdrops fall from the sky → players locate them → fight and claim high-value loot!

---

### **✨ Features:**

✦ **Smart Spawning** — Airdrops spawn at safe and random locations across the world.

✦ **Visual Effects** — Drop from sky , particles, and sounds for immersive experience.

✦ **Custom Loot** — Fully configurable rewards inside each airdrop.

✦ **Auto & Manual Drops** — Spawn automatically or via commands.

---

### **📦 Airdrop System:**

| Type           | Description                 |
| -------------- | --------------------------- |
| Normal Drop    | Basic loot rewards          |
| Rare Drop      | Better loot and rewards     |
| Epic Drop      | High-tier items             |
| Legendary Drop | Very rare and powerful loot |

---

### **⚙️ How It Works:**

* Airdrop spawns automatically or by admin
* A crate falls slowly from sky
* Location can be broadcasted to players
* First player to open gets the loot

---

### **🛠 Commands:**

| Command           | Use                            |
| ----------------- | ------------------------------ |
| `/airdrop spawn`  | Spawn airdrop at your location |
| `/airdrop random` | Spawn at random location       |
| `/airdrop remove` | Remove active airdrop          |
| `/airdrop reload` | Reload config (OP)             |

---

### **🎯 Use Cases:**

* Survival → More fun & exploration
* Events → Manual drop events
* SMP → Reward active players
* HARDCORE → To make hardcode challenge vid

---

### **🚀 Why Use Airdrop?**

Adds **action, competition, and rewards** to your server, making gameplay more engaging and less boring.

---
